pr.title: feat: Social Channels — WeChat/Weibo integration (DDD/TDD)
pr.body: ## Summary Implements social media channel integration (WeChat/Weibo) as an extension of the IM BC. Follows DDD with TDD — 16 new tests covering config validation, webhook signature verification, and inbound message processing. **12 files changed, +989 lines, 16 new TDD tests** ### Domain Layer (IM BC extension) - `SocialChannelConfig` entity: platform credentials (AppID/AppSecret/Token/EncodingAESKey), webhook URL, verification status - `SocialMessage` value object: normalized inbound message from any social platform - `SocialChannelService`: config CRUD, WeChat SHA1 signature verification (`sort(token,timestamp,nonce) → sha1`), Weibo signature verification, inbound message processing (auto-create IM session + message), mark verified lifecycle - `ChannelTypeWeChat` / `ChannelTypeWeibo` added to valid channel types ### TDD Tests (16 tests) 1. Config create success (WeChat + Weibo) 2. Invalid platform rejection 3. Empty AppID / AppSecret / Token validation 4. Channel not found guard 5. WeChat signature: empty, wrong, correct 6. Weibo signature: wrong, correct 7. Inbound message: text success, empty OpenID, empty content, disabled channel, image/media URL 8. MarkVerified lifecycle 9. Channel type registration check ### Infrastructure - MySQL `SocialChannelConfigRepo` with compile-time interface check - Migration `000004_social_channels`: `social_channel_configs` table with unique channel index - HTTP handler: `CreateConfig` / `GetConfig` / `DeleteConfig` (under JWT auth) - Webhook endpoints (public, no JWT): - `GET /api/v1/social/wechat/{channelID}` — WeChat server URL verification (echostr handshake) - `POST /api/v1/social/wechat/{channelID}` — WeChat inbound message (XML → SocialMessage → IM session+message) - `GET /api/v1/social/weibo/{channelID}` — Weibo webhook verification - `POST /api/v1/social/weibo/{channelID}` — Weibo inbound message (JSON) - Config CRUD routes under authenticated `/api/v1/social-configs/` ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify WeChat XML parsing covers all message types you need (currently: text, image, voice, video/shortvideo). Production may need location, link, event types - [ ] Review `SocialChannelConfig` fields — `EncodingAESKey` is optional (used only for WeChat encrypted mode) - [ ] Check webhook endpoint URLs match your WeChat/Weibo developer console configuration - [ ] Run `go test -race -count=1 ./internal/domain/im/...` — all 23 IM tests should pass (16 new social + 7 existing) - [ ] Verify migration `000004_social_channels.up.sql` — table uses BIGINT IDs consistent with Snowflake ID scheme ### Notes - WeChat XML parsing uses a simplified string-based extractor; production deployment should use `encoding/xml` struct unmarshaling for robustness - Weibo signature uses simplified `sha1(appSecret + body)` — verify against actual Weibo developer documentation for your account type - Social channels reuse existing IM session/message infrastructure — messages from WeChat/Weibo automatically create IM sessions that agents can handle in the same workbench Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
